mapper.select: select a.emp_id, a.emp_nm, a.emp_alias, a.emp_password, a.emp_email, a.position_cd, c.com_cd_nm as position_nm, b.dept_nm, a.dept_cd, a.emp_dept_auth FROM zzz_emp_info a left outer join zzz_dept_info b on a.dept_cd = b.dept_cd left outer join zzz_code_info c on a.position_cd = c.com_cd and c.supi_com_cd ='ZZZ0004' WHERE a.emp_email = #{empEmail} AND a.work_yn ='Y' -- 재직여부 AND a.use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.delete: delete from zzz_user_token where exp_dt < now()
